projectDescription: LuaN1aoAgent is a fully autonomous AI penetration testing agent powered by LLMs, using a P-E-R (Planner-Executor-Reflector) architecture and dual-graph causal reasoning to achieve over 90% success rate on the XBOW benchmark.
keyFeatures: P-E-R (Planner-Executor-Reflector) agent collaboration framework with role separation
Causal graph reasoning with Evidence-Hypothesis-Validation logical chains
Plan-on-Graph (PoG) dynamic DAG-based task planning with topological dependency management
Parallel subtask scheduling with shared bulletin board for real-time finding exchange
MCP (Model Context Protocol) unified tool integration layer
RAG knowledge enhancement using FAISS vector search and PayloadsAllTheThings
Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) mode with Web UI and CLI approval flows
Real-time web dashboard with SQLite persistence for task monitoring
90.4% success rate on XBOW benchmark with $0.09 median exploit cost
Multi-LLM provider support: OpenAI-compatible APIs and Anthropic Claude
publicApiSurface: mcp tools: http_request, shell_exec, python_exec, think, formulate_hypotheses, reflect_on_failure, expert_analysis, retrieve_knowledge, distill_knowledge, web_search, sqlmap_tool, dirsearch_scan, concurrency_test, complete_mission, halt_task, query_causal_graph
core.graph_manager.GraphManager (task DAG and causal graph manager)
